Our Position

The outdoor space is part of the business.

A well-designed outdoor space does real work for your business. It extends your season, keeps guests comfortable in changing conditions, and creates an experience worth returning for. We work with commercial clients who take that seriously.

Who We Work With

The right partner for
projects that demand precision.

We work directly with the people making decisions on commercial outdoor spaces: the operators who carry the P&L, the designers specifying the envelope, and the contractors building to programme. Each engagement is different. The expectation is not.

01
Restaurants & Hospitality

Every uncovered patio seat is revenue at risk. We help operators extend season, protect seating capacity, and create outdoor environments that justify a premium spend.

  • Year-round weather protection without permanent enclosure
  • Infrared heating that extends service into winter months
  • Retractable screens for wind, rain, and privacy control
  • Large-span umbrella systems requiring no building attachment
02
Architects & Designers

We function as a specialist partner on the outdoor envelope. Product specifications, CAD documentation, site visits, and installation coordination sit with one team, under one relationship.

  • Full technical specs and CAD files on request
  • Trade pricing and project volume discounts
  • European engineered products not widely available in Canada
  • Dedicated project contact from brief to handover
03
Builders & Developers

Pre-construction and multi-unit projects need suppliers who commit to a programme and hold to it. Our supply-and-install packages are built around your schedule, not a generic lead time.

  • Pre-construction specification and value engineering
  • Multi-unit volume pricing
  • Site coordination within your construction schedule
  • Post-handover service and warranty management
04
Golf Courses & Recreation

Golf clubs and recreation facilities need outdoor solutions that hold up under daily use while looking the part. Shade, weather protection, and heating that keeps members comfortable without disrupting the landscape.

  • Large-span umbrella coverage requiring no building attachment
  • Retractable awnings for clubhouse terraces and dining areas
  • Heating systems that extend shoulder season use
  • Low-maintenance systems built for high-frequency environments
05
Commercial & Amenity Spaces

Strata amenity decks, commercial plazas, mixed-use developments, and corporate campuses. Outdoor spaces that serve a building's residents or tenants need solutions that perform daily without demanding constant attention.

  • Motorized screens and retractable systems for shared amenity areas
  • All-season coverage for rooftop decks and podium terraces
  • Specification support for developers and strata councils
  • Post-handover service and warranty management

Commercial Solutions

Every solution starts with
the outcome you need.

Every solution starts with a straightforward question: what are you trying to achieve? Extending outdoor use, controlling weather, improving guest experience, adapting to changing conditions. From there we recommend the right system, specify it to your space, and install it ourselves.

Featured Solution
Outdoor Rooms &
Louvre Roof Systems

Create a fully usable outdoor space that works in all seasons, without permanent enclosure.

Motorized louvre blades give complete control over sun, rain, and ventilation. Paired with retractable side screens and integrated heating, the result is a weatherproof space that operates year-round. Ideal for hospitality venues, hotel terraces, and strata amenity spaces where year-round usability translates directly to revenue.

Explore Outdoor Rooms →
Weather & Privacy
Motorized Screens & Shades

Full seasonal flexibility without permanent enclosure. Retract in summer, deploy against rain and wind in winter.

Explore →
Shade & Rain Protection
Retractable Awning Systems

Building-mounted shade and rain protection with a clean architectural finish. Custom spans available up to 12m.

Explore →
Freestanding Coverage
Large-Format Outdoor Umbrellas

Maximum coverage from a single base, with no building attachment required. Panoramic views preserved.

Explore →
Season Extension
Commercial Outdoor Heating

Bromic infrared systems extend the operational season with minimal visual intrusion on a carefully designed space.

Explore →
What We Solve

Four problems.
One consistent approach.

01
Extending Outdoor Use

Retractable systems and integrated heating let commercial spaces stay open and generating revenue long past the point where an uncovered patio would close.

02
Controlling Weather

BC weather does not follow a schedule. Motorized systems respond in seconds, keeping guests dry, shaded, and sheltered from wind without interrupting service.

03
Improving Guest Experience

Comfort is the baseline expectation. The outdoor spaces that stand out are those where the experience feels considered, not improvised with portable heaters and pop-up tents.

04
Adapting to Changing Conditions

Fixed structures commit you to one configuration. Retractable and motorized systems give operators full control over light, airflow, enclosure, and temperature as conditions shift.

Selected Projects

Problems solved.
Spaces that perform.

Cannon Estate Winery
Abbotsford, BC

Building restrictions ruled out a permanent enclosure, but the client needed year-round patio revenue without losing the open-air character guests come for in summer. SmartScreen motorized shades with clear vinyl provided complete wind and rain protection in winter and retracted entirely when the weather allowed. A site restriction became a flexible, year-round solution.

Motorized Screens — SmartScreen
Year-round patio service. Full seasonal flexibility. No permanent structure required.
Pacific Institute of Culinary Arts
Vancouver, BC

A waterfront terrace on False Creek needed weather coverage without obstructing the views that define the dining experience. Stobag Resobox retractable awning provided on-demand shade and rain protection with a clean architectural profile that serves the building without competing with it.

Retractable Awning — Stobag Resobox
All-weather outdoor dining. Views and venue character preserved.
Seymour Golf & Country Club
North Vancouver, BC

An exposed restaurant patio with panoramic course views and no available building attachment points. Traditional awning systems were structurally incompatible. Caravita Amalfi Duo cantilever umbrellas delivered full table coverage from a single base. Sightlines were preserved entirely and no building works were required.

Umbrellas — Caravita Amalfi Duo
Full shade coverage. No building attachment. Course views unaffected.
Supplier Partners

European engineering.
Specified for this climate.

Each supplier was chosen for product quality, commercial track record, and suitability for BC's climate. We can share full specifications and samples on request.

Stobag
Switzerland — Awnings & Louvre Systems

Swiss manufacturer of premium awning and louvre roof systems. Widely specified across European commercial and hospitality projects.

Caravita
Germany — Umbrellas & Parasols

German manufacturer of large-format commercial umbrellas and parasols. A consistent choice for high-end hospitality venues.

Bromic Heating
Australia — Outdoor Heating

Commercial infrared heating systems used in hospitality venues worldwide. Effective, efficient, and designed to complement rather than interrupt the space.

Wizard Screens
North America — Retractable Screen Systems

North American manufacturer of retractable screen and shade systems. Over 25 years developing products suited to the Pacific Northwest climate. Parent company of PatioGurus.
